intro-001.name: Claim Your Swag Bag
intro-001.description: Head to the Pet Store and hatch your 4 free starter pets.

objectives.description: Hatch 4 free pets at the Pet Store

dialogue.start: The Pet Store's got 4 free eggs for newcomers. Go hatch yourself a team.
dialogue.progress: Still only {current}/{total} pets? The store's right there.
dialogue.complete: Not bad. Enjoy a hit of dopamine? Head to the Guard Barracks and check the notice board for more.

intro-002.name: The Guard's Request
intro-002.description: Visit the Guard Barracks in town.

dialogue.start: The guards might have something for you. Head to the barracks.
dialogue.progress: The barracks is inside the town. Look for the big stone building.
dialogue.complete: Good, you found the place. The captain says to check back when you're stronger.

intro-003.name: Rock Bottom
intro-003.description: Mine 10 ores at the Mining Camp.

dialogue.start: Every adventurer needs resources. Head to the Mining Camp and dig up 10 ores.
dialogue.complete: You've got dirt under your fingernails. I respect that.

intro-004.name: Something's Fishy
intro-004.description: Catch 10 fish at the Fishing Dock.

dialogue.start: The dock master needs help. Go catch 10 fish — any kind will do.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} fish caught. The gulls are jealous.
dialogue.complete: Not bad for a landlubber. Here's your reward.

intro-005.name: Timber!
intro-005.description: Chop 10 logs at the Lumber Forest.

dialogue.start: The carpenter is screaming about a wood shortage. Cut down 10 logs.
dialogue.complete: The carpenter can stop screaming now. Well done.

dialogue.start: Time to put those ores to use. Head to the Smithy and smelt 5 bars.
dialogue.complete: A smith in the making. JackTown needs more like you.

fetch-001.name: The Blacksmith's Hamster
fetch-001.description: The blacksmith needs 10 copper ore... for his pet hamster's cage. Don't ask.

dialogue.start: Look, my hamster is very particular about his living arrangements. Just get me the ore.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} copper ore. My hamster is getting impatient.
dialogue.complete: Perfect. Mr. Whiskers will be thrilled. Here, take this.

fetch-002.name: Questionable Fish Stew
fetch-002.description: The tavern cook needs 15 fish for a stew. The health inspector would not approve.

dialogue.start: The tavern needs fish for tonight's stew. Any fish. ALL the fish. Don't ask about the recipe.
dialogue.progress: {current}/{total} fish. The pot is simmering ominously.
dialogue.complete: Brilliant. The stew is... well, it's something. Here's your coin.

skill-001.name: Apprentice Miner
skill-001.description: Reach level 10 in Mining to prove your worth.

dialogue.start: The mining guild only accepts level 10 miners. Time to put in the work.
dialogue.progress: Current level: {current}. Target: {total}. Keep at it.
dialogue.complete: Level 10! The guild recognizes your skill. Welcome, apprentice.
